en: And the LORD said to Moses, "See, I have made you like God to Pharaoh, and your brother Aaron shall be your prophet.
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“看哪，我使你在法老面前好像 神一樣；你哥哥亞倫要作你的先知。

en: You shall speak all that I command you, and your brother Aaron shall tell Pharaoh to let the people of Israel go out of his land.
zh: 我吩咐你的一切，你都要說；你哥哥亞倫要告訴法老，法老就讓以色列人離開他的地。

en: But I will harden Pharaoh's heart, and though I multiply my signs and wonders in the land of Egypt,
zh: 我要使法老心硬，我也要在埃及地加增我的神蹟奇事。

en: Pharaoh will not listen to you. Then I will lay my hand on Egypt and bring my hosts, my people the children of Israel, out of the land of Egypt by great acts of judgment.
zh: 可是法老不聽你們的話，我必下手擊打埃及；藉著嚴厲的刑罰把我的軍隊，我的人民以色列人，從埃及地領出來。

en: The Egyptians shall know that I am the LORD, when I stretch out my hand against Egypt and bring out the people of Israel from among them."
zh: 我向埃及伸手，把以色列人從他們中間領出來的時候，埃及人就必知道我是耶和華。”

en: Moses and Aaron did so; they did just as the LORD commanded them.
zh: 摩西和亞倫這樣行了；耶和華怎樣吩咐摩西和亞倫，他們就照樣行了。

en: Now Moses was eighty years old, and Aaron eighty-three years old, when they spoke to Pharaoh.
zh: 摩西和亞倫與法老說話的時候，摩西八十歲，亞倫八十三歲。

en: Then the LORD said to Moses and Aaron,
zh: 耶和華告訴摩西和亞倫說：

en: "When Pharaoh says to you, 'Prove yourselves by working a miracle,' then you shall say to Aaron, 'Take your staff and cast it down before Pharaoh, that it may become a serpent.'"
zh: “如果法老告訴你們說：‘你們行件奇事吧’，你就要對亞倫說：‘拿你的手杖來，把它丟在法老面前，它就會變作蛇。’”

en: So Moses and Aaron went to Pharaoh and did just as the LORD commanded. Aaron cast down his staff before Pharaoh and his servants, and it became a serpent.
zh: 摩西和亞倫就進到法老那裡，照著耶和華吩咐他們的行了；亞倫把手杖丟在法老和法老的臣僕面前，手杖就變了蛇。

en: Then Pharaoh summoned the wise men and the sorcerers, and they, the magicians of Egypt, also did the same by their secret arts.
zh: 於是，法老也把智慧人和行法術的人召了來；他們本是埃及的術士，也用他們的巫術照樣行了。

en: For each man cast down his staff, and they became serpents. But Aaron's staff swallowed up their staffs.
zh: 他們各人都丟下自己的手杖，手杖就變了蛇；亞倫的手杖卻吞了他們的手杖。

en: Still Pharaoh's heart was hardened, and he would not listen to them, as the LORD had said.
zh: 法老心裡剛硬，不肯聽他們的話，就像耶和華所說的一樣。

en: Then the LORD said to Moses, "Pharaoh's heart is hardened; he refuses to let the people go.
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“法老心裡固執，拒絕讓人民離去。

en: Go to Pharaoh in the morning, as he is going out to the water. Stand on the bank of the Nile to meet him, and take in your hand the staff that turned into a serpent.
zh: 明天早晨你要到法老那裡去。看哪，法老出來到水邊去的時候，你要站在河邊迎見他；那變過蛇的手杖，你要拿在手裡。

en: And you shall say to him, 'The LORD, the God of the Hebrews, sent me to you, saying, "Let my people go, that they may serve me in the wilderness. But so far, you have not obeyed."
zh: 你要對法老說：‘耶和華希伯來人的 神差我到你這裡來，說：“讓我的人民離開這裡，好使他們可以在曠野事奉我”，你看，直到現在你還是不聽。

en: Thus says the LORD, "By this you shall know that I am the LORD: behold, with the staff that is in my hand I will strike the water that is in the Nile, and it shall turn into blood.
zh: 耶和華這樣說：“看哪，我要用我手裡的杖擊打河中的水，水就必變成血；因此你就知道我是耶和華。

en: The fish in the Nile shall die, and the Nile will stink, and the Egyptians will grow weary of drinking water from the Nile."'"
zh: 河中的魚必死亡，河水也必發臭，埃及人就必厭惡喝這河裡的水。”’”

en: And the LORD said to Moses, "Say to Aaron, 'Take your staff and stretch out your hand over the waters of Egypt, over their rivers, their canals, and their ponds, and all their pools of water, so that they may become blood, and there shall be blood throughout all the land of Egypt, even in vessels of wood and in vessels of stone.'"
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“你要對亞倫說：‘拿你的手杖來，把你的手伸在埃及的眾水之上，就是在他們的江、河、池和所有水塘之上，使水都變成血。因此，在埃及全地，連木器石器中都必有血。’”

en: Moses and Aaron did as the LORD commanded. In the sight of Pharaoh and in the sight of his servants he lifted up the staff and struck the water in the Nile, and all the water in the Nile turned into blood.
zh: 摩西和亞倫就這樣行了，就像耶和華所吩咐的；亞倫在法老面前和法老的臣僕面前舉起手杖，擊打河裡的水，河裡的水就都變了血。

en: And the fish in the Nile died, and the Nile stank, so that the Egyptians could not drink water from the Nile. There was blood throughout all the land of Egypt.
zh: 河裡的魚死了，河水發臭了，埃及人也不能喝這河裡的水了；在埃及，全地都有血。

en: But the magicians of Egypt did the same by their secret arts. So Pharaoh's heart remained hardened, and he would not listen to them, as the LORD had said.
zh: 埃及的術士也用他們的巫術這樣行了；可是法老卻心裡剛硬，不肯聽摩西和亞倫，就像耶和華所說的。

en: Pharaoh turned and went into his house, and he did not take even this to heart.
zh: 法老轉身回到宮裡去，也不把這事放在心上。

en: And all the Egyptians dug along the Nile for water to drink, for they could not drink the water of the Nile.
zh: 所有的埃及人都在河的周圍掘地，要得水喝，因為他們不能喝這河裡的水。

en: Seven full days passed after the LORD had struck the Nile.
zh: 耶和華擊打尼羅河以後，滿了七天。
